_meta.description: 9-mer frequencies from 842 clinical antibodies. VH and IGK (kappa VL) sub-libraries both present. Family-conditioned voting with automatic global fallback. Used with OAS supplement (oas_human_9mer_v1.json.gz) for dual-database weighted voting in ContextualSubstitutionEngine.

voting_weights.note: Each clinical-842 window hit = W_CLINICAL_VOTE votes. Each OAS-present window hit = W_OAS_VOTE votes. Combined score used for Layer-2 threshold and ratio check.
